# Local Copilot Overrides (example)

This file documents the expected format for `.github/copilot-local.md`.
Do not put machine-specific values in this tracked example file.

Create `.github/copilot-local.md` locally with values for your machine only.

## Tool paths

- `cargo.exe`: `C:\\Path\\To\\cargo.exe`

## Notes

- Local overrides are optional.
- Local overrides take priority over generic environment guesses.
- `.github/copilot-local.md` should remain gitignored.
